summary: Iteration 21: Testing New Case Form overhaul with new fields (implant_procedure_type, loading_type, prosthetic_plan). Backend: 15/15 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: Form UI verified with all sections present, 9 procedure types in dropdown, loading type chips working, conditional prosthetic plan dropdown, and Phase 1 checklist with 10 items. Removed fields (Implant Site, Implant Region, Implant Company, IOS/CBCT upload) confirmed NOT present.

issues: The Schedule section shows helper text 'Saturday: 10:00 AM only' but the backend actually uses 09:30 for Saturday - minor discrepancy. Frontend shows 10:00 but backend validates 09:30.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend properly validates implant_procedure_type against 9 valid types
Backend properly validates loading_type against ['Immediate Loading', 'Delayed Loading']
Backend /api/prosthetic-options endpoint correctly returns options based on procedure type and loading type combinations
Frontend getProstheticOptions() function correctly computes conditional options
Frontend time slot filtering works based on day of week
Phase 1 checklist has all 10 required items
Removed fields (implant_site, implant_region, implant_company) kept as optional in backend for backward compatibility but not shown in frontend
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Case form fully tested. Form has 6 sections: Patient Info, Faculty, Payment, Schedule, Procedure Details, Checklist. Procedure Type dropdown shows 9 options. Loading Type has Immediate/Delayed chips (multi-select). Prosthetic Plan dropdown appears conditionally based on procedure type + loading type. Phase 1 checklist has 10 items. Removed old fields: implant_site, implant_region, implant_company, IOS upload, CBCT upload.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/case-form-options: PASS - Returns procedure_types (9), loading_types (2), prosthetic_options (4 categories)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/procedures with new fields: PASS - Creates procedure with implant_procedure_type, loading_type[], prosthetic_plan

frontend_form_sections.Patient Information: PASS - Patient Name, Registration Number fields
frontend_form_sections.Faculty: PASS - Supervising Faculty dropdown, Implant Incharge dropdown
frontend_form_sections.Schedule: PASS - Date picker, Time slots (10:00 AM, 2:00 PM for weekdays)
frontend_form_sections.Procedure Details: PASS - Type of Implant Procedure dropdown, Type of Loading chips, Prosthetic Plan conditional dropdown, Bone Graft text area

time_slot_behavior.saturday_shows_only_10am: Verified in backend test - frontend shows 10:00 AM only for Saturday
